claim_boundary: Under protocol ESA-HERA-DART-D205, the official ESA Hera web page supports the narrow claim that Hera is intended to perform a close-up survey of the DART impact aftermath on the Didymos/Dimorphos system and gather information such as crater size, Dimorphos mass, make-up and internal structure.
source_rights_note: ESA official public web page. No redistribution restrictions for link verification.
raw_payload_manifest: Content hash recorded in local run
runner_command: uv run claimbound run-root --protocol-id ESA-HERA-DART-D205 --source-url https://www.esa.int/Space_Safety/Hera/... --operator NeoZorK
known_limitations: Source boundary limited to ESA official Hera web page only
Does not evaluate mission success or planetary defence capability
Does not assess DART mission or NASA involvement
Card records only the stated Hera survey and measurement intent, not completed results
Source accessed 2026-06-25; future source drift not recorded in this card
baseline_control_summary: Gate: Official ESA source page must explicitly name the mission/capability and confirm the narrow claim. Success means: (1) Source is accessible, (2) Source is from esa.int domain, (3) Relevant claim statement appears in source text, (4) No contradictions with claim boundary.
